prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2023年物理类最低位次约5355→5074→5494名，近三年波动幅度约400名，整体在5000–5500区间窄幅震荡；2024年物理类，2025年基准位次约5300名；本省物理类计划2021年9人、2022年2人、2023年1人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划2人，较2025年（推断1人）扩招100%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力有 所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第53名，近年排名稳步上升（2021年第46→2022年第50→2023年第47→2024年第58→2025年第56→2026年第53 ），整体处于全国50强区间；2026年声誉评价偏正面，主要源于81岁博士毕业等正面事件，对学校形象有积极提升；抖音热度一般（总排名第89位），未见明显 投档断档记录；教育学A+（全国顶尖）、中国史A-、心理学A-、政治学A-、马克思主义理论A-，师范类学科实力突出，与学校办学定位高度一致。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，可能带动物理类考生报考意愿；师范/教育专业热度分化观望，热度一般；本省2026年考生总数约20万人，物 理类占比约72%（约14.4万人）；华中师范大学位于湖北武汉，在辽宁省招生占比约2.3%–3.2%（2021–2025 年），属跨省招生中等水平；本地高校（如东北大学、大连理工）竞争分流效应持续存在。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅震荡、2026年计划大幅扩招100%、学校声誉偏正面 及本省考生规模持平，扩招对位次的下拉作用（位次数字增大）与声誉提升对位次的上推作用（位次数字减小）相互对冲，整体预计竞争略趋缓和；预测最低位次约8280名，区间 7780–8780名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5355 → 5074 → 5494, with a fluctuation range of about 400 positions in recent three years, overall oscillating narrowly within the 5000–5500 range; for 2024 Physics Category, the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5300; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 9 in 2021, 2 in 2022, and 1 in 2023, showing a decreasing trend year by year; the 2026 plan is 2, an increase of 100% compared to 2025 (inferred as 1), with a significant expansion rate, alleviating competitive pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years (46th in 2021 → 50th in 2022 → 47th in 2023 → 58th in 2024 → 56th in 2025 → 53rd in 2026), overall within the national top 50 range; the 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to positive events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate, which has positively enhanced the school's image; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranked 89th), with no obvious record of admission cut-off drops; Education is A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, highly consistent with the school's positioning.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to high social popularity, potentially boosting the willingness of Physics Category candidates to apply; teacher-training/education majors show divided popularity with average interest; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 200,000, with Physics Category accounting for approximately 72% (about 144,000); Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with an enrollment share in Liaoning Province of about 2.3%–3.2% (2021–2025), which is a moderate level for cross-provincial enrollment; the competitive diversion effect from local universities (such as Northeastern University and Dalian University of Technology) continues to exist.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the significant 100% expansion in the 2026 plan, the relatively positive school reputation, and the stable number of candidates in the province, the downward effect of expansion on ranking (increasing ranking number) and the upward effect of reputation improvement on ranking (decreasing ranking number) offset each other, overall competition is expected to be slightly eased; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8280, with a range of 7780–8780.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (7780–8780), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7780), focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Statistics and Electronic Information Category; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8780), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1393 → 2417 → 2368 → 1055, with significant fluctuations over the past four years: a sharp drop of about 1024 places in 2022, remaining roughly stable in 2023, and a sharp rise of about 1313 places in 2024; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1500; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 7 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 1 in 2023, and 1 in 2024, showing a significant reduction followed by stabilization; the 2026 plan is 1, unchanged from 2025 (inferred as 1), with no change in the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years, placing it in the national top 50; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, with events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate enhancing the university's social image; Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Education is rated A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, and Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding strength in liberal arts disciplines, strongly attracting History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors is mixed and cautious, with overall average popularity; law majors are recommended as relatively popular, Chinese language/literature majors are recommended as relatively popular, and related majors have high application popularity; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 200,000, with History Category accounting for about 28% (about 56,000), roughly unchanged from 2025 (56,300); Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with a History Category enrollment share in Liaoning of about 2.3%–3.2%, which is a moderate level of cross-provincial enrollment; other ministry-affiliated normal universities such as Northeast Normal University form competitive diversion in the Northeast region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the relatively positive university reputation, and the stable provincial candidate pool, against the backdrop of a sharp rise in 2024 rankings, a slight correction is expected in 2026 but competition remains high; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1470, with a range of 1205–1735.
